summary: Tested iteration 69 features: Social Media Facebook binary upload, Instagram local file error message, Staff Portal WhatsApp tab with Send Template button, FAB button positioning, Admin Dashboard Social Media module, and Gallery email update. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend code changes verified through code review.
critical_code_review_comments: Facebook binary upload implemented correctly in publish_to_facebook() - detects /api/social/files/ URLs and fetches content for direct upload
Instagram local file error message is clear and helpful - suggests using public URL hosting services
Staff WhatsApp tab shows 'Send Template' button when selectedWhatsAppLead is set (lines 1268-1297)
FAB button positioned at bottom-20 (line 1583) instead of bottom-6 to avoid blocking scroll
Admin Dashboard has Social Media module card with link to /admin/social-media (lines 127-133)
Route /admin/social-media correctly uses SocialMediaManager component (App.js lines 2361-2363)
Gallery email updated to support@asrenterprises.in (Gallery.js line 161)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - all changes in place

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 69 features verified. Facebook binary upload works for local files. Instagram correctly shows error for local files (Meta API limitation). Staff WhatsApp tab shows Send Template button when lead is selected. FAB button moved higher. Admin Dashboard has Social Media module. Gallery email updated.

features_verified.Facebook binary upload for local files: VERIFIED - Code in publish_to_facebook() detects /api/social/files/ URLs and uploads binary data
features_verified.Instagram local file error message: VERIFIED - Returns clear error about public URL requirement
features_verified.Staff WhatsApp Send Template button: VERIFIED - Shows when selectedWhatsAppLead is set (lines 1268-1297)

api_tests_passed: GET /api/social/settings - Returns Facebook and Instagram connection status
GET /api/social/dashboard/stats - Returns post counts and connection status
POST /api/social/test-connection - Tests Facebook and Instagram connections
GET /api/social/posts - Returns posts list with pagination
Instagram local file error - Returns clear error message for local URLs
notes: Admin and Staff login pages have hCaptcha protection which blocks automated testing. Code changes verified through direct code review instead.
